title: Smart Reflow Oven Controller
description: Arduino-based reflow oven controller retrofitted into a household toaster oven. A MAX6675 K-type thermocouple reads the oven air temperature; a PID loop drives two SSRs (top and bottom elements); the controller follows a lead-free reflow profile (preheat → soak → reflow → cool). Rotary encoder and OLED provide profile selection and live temperature + phase display.
objective: Follow IPC J-STD-020 lead-free reflow profile: preheat 25→150 °C in 60–90 s; soak 150–200 °C for 60–120 s; reflow 200→250 °C peak for 20–40 s; cool to < 100 °C. Temperature accuracy ±5 °C.
constraints: 230 V mains toaster oven (1200 W); 5 V USB logic supply; two 25 A SSRs; MAX6675 K-type probe; ≤ £30 controller BOM.
supporting_fact_titles: Rotary Encoder — Incremental A/B Quadrature Pulse Counting
OLED SSD1306 Monochrome Display I²C Interface

element_usage_notes.MAX6675 K-Type Thermocouple SPI Module: Ungrounded K-type probe inserted through oven side wall; SPI CS=D10; polled every 250 ms; 4-sample median filter removes thermal noise.
element_usage_notes.Solid-State Relay Mains Actuator Switchi: Two Fotek SSR-25DA — one for top element (D5), one for bottom element (D6); both zero-cross; 1-s window PID duty cycle; heatsinks mounted outside oven.
element_usage_notes.Rotary Encoder User-Interface Navigation: KY-040; CLK D2 INT0; rotate to select reflow profile (lead-free / leaded / custom); press to start/abort cycle.
element_usage_notes.SSD1306 OLED Display UI Module: 128×64; top row: PHASE name; middle: setpoint vs actual °C (large); bottom: elapsed time + PID power %.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Uno/Nano MCU Platform: Nano 3.0; SPI MAX6675 D10–D13; I²C OLED A4/A5; SSR1=D5, SSR2=D6; encoder CLK=D2, DT=D4, SW=D3; buzzer D8.

element_interactions.data: temp_c (float, 0.25 °C resolution) via SPI every 250 ms
element_interactions.description: 4-sample median filter applied; temperature is process variable for active reflow phase PID. Reading > 300 °C aborts cycle and cuts SSRs immediately.

element_interactions.data: profile selection (CW/CCW rotate) + start/abort (press) via GPIO INT
element_interactions.description: Before start: rotate selects profile; press starts cycle. During cycle: press aborts immediately (both SSRs off). Encoder direction ignored during active reflow.

element_interactions.data: PWM duty cycle (1-s window, 0–100 %) on GPIO D5 and D6
element_interactions.description: PID output split evenly between top and bottom elements. During COOL phase: both SSRs forced OFF; oven door slightly ajar (servo not included in v1).

element_interactions.data: I²C framebuffer: phase_name, setpoint_c, actual_c, elapsed_s, pid_pct
element_interactions.description: OLED updated at 2 Hz. Phase transitions shown with 1-second inversion flash. End-of-cycle buzzer 3× beeps then DONE screen.
